subcodes.first_line: O dear friend! You had written concerning the women's teaching assembly; this matter is exceedingly beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز در خصوص محفل تبلیغ نساء مرقوم نموده بودید این قضیه بسیار محبوب
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach
